steps.title: Use the dollar clue
steps.content: The vase is described as marked at about twelve or fourteen dollars. The dollar amount shows that marked refers to the amount shown for sale.

steps.title: Choose the retail meaning
steps.content: In this context, marked means priced. A refers to arranging a scene, C refers to discoloring something, and D refers to observing something; none fits a dollar amount on merchandise. The answer is B.
